Class MemberController

java.lang.Object
org.codewithmagret.rest.member.MemberController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/members") public class MemberController extends Object
REST controller for Member endpoints.

  • Constructor Details

    • MemberController

      public MemberController(MemberService memberService)
      Constructs a MemberController.

      memberService - member service

  • Method Details

    • createMember

      @PostMapping public Member createMember(@RequestBody Member member)
      Creates a new member.
      Parameters:
      member - member request body
      Returns:
      saved member

    • getAllMembers

      @GetMapping public List<Member> getAllMembers()
      Returns all members.
      Returns:
      list of members

    • getMemberById

      @GetMapping("/{id}") public Member getMemberById(@PathVariable Long id)
      Returns a member by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - member ID
      Returns:
      matching member

    • searchByName

      @GetMapping("/search/name") public List<Member> searchByName(@RequestParam String name)
      Searches members by name.
      Parameters:
      name - member name
      Returns:
      list of matching members

    • searchByMembershipType

      @GetMapping("/search/type") public List<Member> searchByMembershipType(@RequestParam String type)
      Searches members by membership type.
      Parameters:
      type - membership type
      Returns:
      list of matching members

    • searchByPhoneNumber

      @GetMapping("/search/phone") public List<Member> searchByPhoneNumber(@RequestParam String phone)
      Searches members by phone number.
      Parameters:
      phone - phone number
      Returns:
      list of matching members

    • searchByTournamentStartDate

      @GetMapping("/search/tournament-date") public List<Member> searchByTournamentStartDate(@RequestParam @DateTimeFormat(iso=DATE) LocalDate startDate)
      Searches members by tournament start date.
      Parameters:
      startDate - tournament start date
      Returns:
      list of matching members

    • updateMember

      @PutMapping("/{id}") public Member updateMember(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody Member member)
      Updates an existing member.
      Parameters:
      id - member ID
      member - updated member data
      Returns:
      updated member

    • deleteMember

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") public void deleteMember(@PathVariable Long id)
      Deletes a member by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - member ID
